must_detect.matched_text:
CONFIDENTIAL — NON-PUBLIC — Board/Legal Memo (Reg FD applies) — do not forward outside NovaStrand Health Corp.
Re: Project Blue Harbor — proposed acquisition of Sablewood Clinical Analytics, Inc. by NovaStrand Health Corp. (U.S. issuer in healthcare).
Status: Definitive Agreement executed 2026-06-14; closing targeted Q3 FY26, subject to HSR clearance and customary closing conditions.
Consideration: $245,000,000 cash + up to $40,000,000 earn-out; implies 18.5% premium to Sablewood’s last undisturbed close on the Cascadia Exchange (Apex Market).
E M B A R G O until 2026-07-15 08:30 ET; Form 8-K and press release to be filed with the SEC concurrently; N D A applies.
Reg FD reminder: no selective disclosure to sell-side or to Amber Cove Capital; all inquiries routed through IR; draft Q&A held back until embargo.
The D A includes MAE/MAC carve-outs (pandemics, changes in GAAP, industry conditions); no MAC has occurred, and ordinary seasonal census declines shall not constitute a MAE.
Financing: committed facility from First Beacon Bancshares, N.A.; internal wire template a c c t: **7•8•84; r0ut1ng: 12-34-56 (test string only, not live).
Synergies/operational: expected run-rate synergies of $22,000,000 by FY27; workforce realignment <4.0% of FTE; integration cost ~$9,700,000 over 12 months.
Commercial note (non-public): AmberLynx HMO pilot shows 12% lift in pre-authorization throughput; June pipeline indicates 2-quarter pull-in of two payer contracts.
Data/Privacy: acquired assets include de-identified claims and bank feed metadata; no PHI or GLBA NPI may be exported; see htt ps://policies.novastrandhealth.com/hipaa?ver=dr aft_3 for handling.
public-source context: the 2024 CMS telehealth report is in the public domain and is not MNPI; we may cite it in the script.
IR script D R A F T (v0.9): “no change to FY26 revenue guide; modest FY27 accretion”; subject to embargo and final audit; selective analyst briefings are prohibited.
Process checklist (internal): todo: confirm redline §5.3 reps & warranties; §7.2 interim covenants; finalize disclosure schedules; post clean copy to v-room and tag items for Mr. Alcott.
